hint: Is this a COMMAND not to do something? Who is being commanded (the agent)?
explanation: 'X is consistent' means X is possible — ◇X. Here the descriptive Pu ('you're praying') and the command ∼P͟u ('don't pray') can both hold, so the whole thing is ◇(Pu · ∼P͟u). The underline marks the commanded action, separating it from the mere description.
